creator: ler@FreeBSD.org
text:
On 2014-05-24 14:17, Jimmy Olgeni wrote:
> Hi,
> 
> The patch will just bump PORTREVISION -- is anything else missing?
It needs ports/190180, ports/190182 (upgrades for dovecot2, 
dovecot2-pigeonhole

this is per the instructions in mail/dovecot2/Makefile
